reviews.review_title: This site makes absolutely no sense.
reviews.review_description: I've gone through the make new account and clicked on the download button and then verified that I want to get this.  And then nothing.  No link to download.  Just a description.

developer_response.body: Hello! We apologize for the issue you are experiencing. We request you to contact us at phonecastvr@samsung.com with detailed issue description along with 'Model number (Setting -> About Phone) ', 'Country info', and 'Carrier info so that we can help you further. We look forward to hearing from you. Thanks!

reviews.review_description: This app is essential. With the recent introduction of the labs feature you can now launch any app on your phone in VR. KINDLE, Comixology and Kodi are three of my favs. They have also added a perfect repositioning function to get the screen exactly where you want it. When I had an issue with the app I emailed the team and it was sorted within hours. Great app, great team. Thank you.

reviews.review_title: A must have app for GearVR
reviews.review_description: There are many apps on the GearVR platform, but this one is the one everyone should have. Its biggest feature being that it can load almost all apps on your phone on a HUGE private screen(assuming you have enabled Samsung Labs), which is nice for viewing movies but also for productivity, as it is a cinch to load remote desktop, word processors, and ebook readers this way. Who said VR has no practical utility?

reviews.review_title: Oh how you accidentally made my day
reviews.review_description: I'll start off with this is a great app. Read the reviews and just download it already. I was cruising through the oculus store and came across this app. I downloaded it hoping to be able to cast my vr screen to my samsung tv. Unfortunately you cant do that BUT!!!! I was way happier to find out that I finally have an app that will play my hulu LIVE on a big screen. I pay 40 bucks a month for hulu so I dont miss a single collage football game through the season. ALL the apps in vr that have hulu, only have hulu movies and TV.  But not live tv. I've been stuck watching all of my Boise State football games on my S8plus. Now I can load it up on this app and watch on a MASSIVE screen. Great job on this app its absolutely beautiful. And there is so so so much more in here. if only you could figure out how to make it bring me a beer I would gladly give 10 stars. Cheers!!!!

developer_response.body: Hi mhart2519! Thanks for your 5 star rating. We also appreciate your valuable feedback. Please stay tuned as we will continue to add more features for you to enjoy. If you have any additional suggestions or concerns, please email us at phonecastvr@samsung.com. Thanks!

reviews.review_description:
Region blocked, so I used USA VPN to install it. No need for VPN to use it later, that is good.
Unique thing about this app is that it allows you to open two 2D apps next to each other.
But no support for on-screen keyboard limits the usability.
Some apps (e.g. Kindle) kick you out of the environment, so you have to take your phone out and put it back in in order to go back to the Gear VR environment. Some apps crash, some functions are unsupported.
But overall, a good experience for touch controlled apps (e.g. TV streaming apps, HBO GO, PluralSight). It has special support for some apps (e.g. MX Player and YouTube), you can present those apps in theater mode.
I could use Microsoft Remote Desktop with Bluetooth keyboard, but mouse pointer was not easily controllable.
Would love to see support for Samsung DeX support with improved mouse support (both left and right clicks).

developer_response.body: Hi svetislav.milicevic! Thanks for your taking time for the review. We appreciate your valuable feedback. We will take this as a suggestion. If you have any additional suggestions or concerns, please email us at phonecastvr@samsung.com. Thanks!
